title: Emissive Programmer Art Patch
description: Ever wanted to play modern minecraft with the oldschool style, while still keeping those beautiful glowing ores? This texture pack aims to do just that.
body:
# Emissive Programmer Art Patch
## Glowing ores and more with the old-school minecraft look!
**Ever wanted to have glowing ores with minecraft's old-school textures completely in vanilla?**                    
**This texture pack does just that! (and even more...)**

EPAP is meant to be used as a patch that goes **_on top_** of not only Minecraft's built-in "Programmer Art" texture pack but also [THGABS' Programmer Art Fix](https://modrinth.com/project/d1nRD7RG) texture pack. (see image below)

<details>
<summary>Setup Example</summary>

![Setup Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/241ece5fc747e27f3fcbfa3932145038e76adaff.png)

</details>




### EPAP features emissive textures for:
- All stone, deepslate and nether ores (except coal)
- Crimson & Warped stems and fungi
- Creaking hearts
- Observers
- Crafters
- Copper bulbs
- Redstone rails
- Respawn Anchor
- Crying Obsidian
- Redstone repeaters & Comparitors
- All command blocks
  
**This texture pack is still a work in progress and some things are still missing**
### Planned additions for the future:
- Emissive redstone dust
- Magma
- Shroomlight
- Glowstone
- All sculk related blocks
